THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 5264 3RD STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSON, RUTH $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00, IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $720.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON NOV-25-2013 AND ON THE 25TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY NICOLETA SIMIONESCU--PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, RUTH
